\tzpentry{ID3965}{Coupled Quantum Curvature Expectation Value}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3965 introduces Coupled Quantum Curvature Expectation Value as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[R_{ij} = \\\\frac{1}{\\\\hbar}\\\\left| \\\\langle i | \\\\hat{H}_T | j \\\\rangle \\\\right|^2,\\\\]
